hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【CRYPTO】尽管库存创纪录、油价下跌并缓解了战争担忧，但比特币和以太币变化不大；【WORLD】万斯表示，美国和伊朗“非常接近”达成协议，但“尚未达成”；【WORLD】伊朗战争最新动态：美国官员表示，他们正在接近安排重新开放霍尔木兹海峡。

items.title: Bitcoin, ether little-changed despite record stocks, falling oil and easing war fears
items.summary: Global stocks hit records and oil cracked on a tentative US-Iran ceasefire extension. Crypto stayed on the sidelines, with some analysts saying the next catalyst is regulatory, not geopolitical.
items.title_zh: 尽管库存创纪录、油价下跌并缓解了战争担忧，但比特币和以太币变化不大
items.summary_zh: 由于美伊暂定停火协议延长，全球股市创下历史新高，石油价格大幅上涨。加密货币仍处于观望状态，一些分析师表示，下一个催化剂是监管，而不是地缘政治。

items.title: US and Iran 'very close' to deal but 'not there yet', Vance says
items.summary: US officials earlier told the BBC that the framework of a ceasefire extension deal had been agreed, pending the approval of Trump and Iran's leadership.
items.title_zh: 万斯表示，美国和伊朗“非常接近”达成协议，但“尚未达成”
items.summary_zh: 美国官员早些时候告诉英国广播公司，延长停火协议的框架已经商定，有待特朗普和伊朗领导人的批准。

items.title: Iran War Updates: U.S. Officials Say They Are Closing In on Arrangement to Reopen Strait of Hormuz
items.summary: President Trump has not signed off on the emerging framework, according to U.S. officials. But it could set the table for extending the cease-fire and more substantive negotiations.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争最新动态：美国官员表示，他们正在接近安排重新开放霍尔木兹海峡
items.summary_zh: 据美国官员称，特朗普总统尚未签署这一新兴框架。但它可以为延长停火和进行更实质性的谈判奠定基础。

items.title: Bitcoin's record holder supply hides a buyer drought, CryptoQuant says
items.summary: A record high in long-term holder supply typically signals conviction. CryptoQuant says it reflects a shortage of new buyers, a view echoed by weakening ETF demand and bearish prediction market odds.
items.title_zh: CryptoQuant 表示，比特币的创纪录供应量掩盖了买家的匮乏
items.summary_zh: 长期持有者供应量创历史新高通常标志着人们的信念。 CryptoQuant 表示，这反映了新买家的短缺，ETF 需求疲软和市场悲观预测的可能性也印证了这一观点。

items.title: Calamos bets protected Bitcoin ETFs can outlast crypto market swings
items.summary: As more than $1 billion exited spot Bitcoin ETFs last week, Calamos says investors are rotating into Bitcoin products with built-in downside protection.
items.title_zh: Calamos 押注受保护的比特币 ETF 能够经受住加密货币市场波动的考验
items.summary_zh: 卡拉莫斯表示，随着上周超过 10 亿美元退出现货比特币 ETF，投资者正在转向具有内置下行保护功能的比特币产品。

items.title: Why the Ethereum Foundation is suddenly again at the center of crypto’s culture war
items.summary: In this week's edition of The Protocol Newsletter, we're diving deep into the institution that has been the main steward for the Ethereum blockchain, and why its been back in the spotlight.
items.title_zh: 为什么以太坊基金会突然再次成为加密货币文化战争的中心
items.summary_zh: 在本周的《协议通讯》中，我们将深入探讨这个一直是以太坊区块链主要管理者的机构，以及它为何重新成为人们关注的焦点。

items.title: CryptoQuant says bitcoin whale and dolphin accumulation stalled as demand remains weak
items.summary: Bitcoin holding structure continues to deteriorate as whale and dolphin BTC balances have stalled, CryptoQuant said.
items.title_zh: CryptoQuant表示，由于需求依然疲弱，比特币鲸鱼和海豚的积累陷入停滞
items.summary_zh: CryptoQuant 表示，随着鲸鱼和海豚的 BTC 余额停滞不前，比特币持有结构继续恶化。

items.title: Warp’s big bet on building open source with GPT-5.5
items.summary: Warp uses GPT-5.5 and OpenAI models to coordinate coding agents across local, cloud, and open-source development workflows.
items.title_zh: Warp 押注于使用 GPT-5.5 构建开源
items.summary_zh: Warp 使用 GPT-5.5 和 OpenAI 模型来协调本地、云和开源开发工作流程中的编码代理。

items.title: OpenAI, Grupo Folha and Grupo UOL announce strategic content partnership
items.summary: OpenAI partners with Grupo Folha and Grupo UOL to bring trusted Brazilian journalism to ChatGPT, expanding access to news with attribution and transparency.
items.title_zh: OpenAI、Grupo Folha 和 Grupo UOL 宣布战略内容合作伙伴关系
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 与 Grupo Folha 和 Grupo UOL 合作，将值得信赖的巴西新闻引入 ChatGPT，通过归属和透明度扩大对新闻的访问。

items.title: Towards Speed-of-Light Text Generation with Nemotron-Labs Diffusion Language Models
items.title_zh: 使用 Nemotron-Labs 扩散语言模型实现光速文本生成

items.title: Jamie Dimon says JPMorgan Chase could spend $20 billion on acquisition: 'We are on the lookout'
items.summary: A $20 billion deal would be among the largest in JPMorgan's history and could invite regulatory scrutiny given its position as the largest U.S. bank by assets.
items.title_zh: 杰米·戴蒙 (Jamie Dimon) 表示摩根大通可能斥资 200 亿美元进行收购：“我们正在密切关注”
items.summary_zh: 这笔 200 亿美元的交易将是摩根大通历史上规模最大的交易之一，鉴于其作为美国资产最大银行的地位，可能会引发监管审查。

items.title: Your AI agent can now trade for you on Robinhood. And buy stuff with your credit card too
items.summary: The new products allow customers to create AI assistants capable of carrying out investing strategies or spending instructions with minimal human involvement.
items.title_zh: 您的人工智能代理现在可以在 Robinhood 上为您进行交易。也可以用信用卡买东西
items.summary_zh: 新产品允许客户创建人工智能助手，能够在最少的人工参与下执行投资策略或支出指令。

items.title: Are US and Iran close to peace or sliding back to war?
items.summary: Neither side seems interested in a return to all-out conflict, despite the latest exchange of strikes.
items.title_zh: 美国和伊朗是接近和平还是滑向战争？
items.summary_zh: 尽管最近发生了相互攻击，但双方似乎都没有兴趣恢复全面冲突。

items.title: Netanyahu says he has directed IDF to increase control of Gaza to 70%
items.summary: The expansion in control by Israel would contradict the terms of the ceasefire Israel and Hamas agreed to in October 2025.
items.title_zh: 内塔尼亚胡表示，他已指示以色列国防军将对加沙的控制权增加到70%
items.summary_zh: 以色列扩大控制权将违反以色列和哈马斯于 2025 年 10 月达成的停火条款。

items.title: Europe Is Edging Closer to a Trade War With China. Here’s Why.
items.summary: As cheap goods pour in, threatening the continent’s manufacturing sector, a search for solutions is becoming increasingly urgent.
items.title_zh: 欧洲正在接近与中国的贸易战。这就是为什么。
items.summary_zh: 随着廉价商品涌入，威胁到非洲大陆的制造业，寻找解决方案变得越来越紧迫。

items.title: How Ukraine’s Street Style Is Shaped by the War
items.summary: In Kyiv, military-inspired fashion can be seen everywhere. Soldiers and civilians alike say it’s a show of solidarity, not a fad.
items.title_zh: 战争如何塑造乌克兰的街头风格
items.summary_zh: 在基辅，军事风格的时尚随处可见。士兵和平民都表示，这是一种团结的表现，而不是一种时尚。

items.title: The Mideast Is Baffled by Trump’s Call to Expand Abraham Accords
items.summary: The president said more countries should be required to recognize Israel as part of a deal to end the war with Iran. Analysts say the chances of that happening are close to zero.
items.title_zh: 特朗普呼吁扩大《亚伯拉罕协议》，中东地区感到困惑
items.summary_zh: 总统表示，作为结束与伊朗战争协议的一部分，应该要求更多国家承认以色列。分析人士表示，这种情况发生的可能性接近于零。

items.title: Strategy's STRC slips below $99 as Strive captures investor attention
items.summary: STRC has struggled to maintain its $100 target price, while Strategy's reduced cash reserves and dividend obligations are drawing increased investor attention.
items.title_zh: 随着 Strive 吸引投资者注意力，Strategy 的 STRC 跌破 99 美元
items.summary_zh: STRC 一直难以维持其 100 美元的目标价，而 Strategy 减少的现金储备和股息义务正吸引越来越多的投资者关注。

items.title: XRP rebounds above $1.30 after volume surge, but bears still control the bigger picture
items.summary: XRP snapped a streak of lower lows on heavy buying, though the token remains stuck below major resistance levels that have capped every rally this year.
items.title_zh: 成交量激增后，XRP 反弹至 1.30 美元上方，但空头仍掌控大局
items.summary_zh: XRP 在大量买盘的推动下打破了一系列较低的低点，但该代币仍停留在限制今年每次上涨的主要阻力位下方。

items.title: Crypto trading firm FalconX confidentially files with SEC for IPO, hires bankers
items.summary: FalconX has hired Cantor and other bankers to advise on a potential IPO and confidentially filed draft paperwork with the SEC, though the listing is not expected until later this year amid volatile market conditions.
items.title_zh: 加密货币交易公司 FalconX 向 SEC 秘密提交 IPO 申请，并聘请银行家
items.summary_zh: FalconX 已聘请 Cantor 和其他银行家就潜在的 IPO 提供建议，并秘密向 SEC 提交文件草案，不过由于市场状况不稳定，预计要到今年晚些时候才会上市。

items.title: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent reiterates ‘no CBDC’ commitment under Trump admin
items.summary: During a Thursday press briefing, Bessent also urged the House and the Senate to get the Clarity Act to the finish line.
items.title_zh: 财政部长 Scott Bessent 重申特朗普政府下“不使用 CBDC”的承诺
items.summary_zh: 在周四的新闻发布会上，贝森特还敦促众议院和参议院完成《澄清法案》。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Bonk (BONK)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #109.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Bonk (BONK)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 109 位。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #82.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Aptos (APT)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 82。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #368.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：io.net (IO)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名#368。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #421.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：然后 (ALLO)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名#421。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #108.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：矮胖企鹅 (PENGU)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 108。

items.title: How Endava builds an agentic organization with Codex
items.summary: Learn how Endava uses Codex to build an agentic organization, accelerating software delivery and reducing requirements analysis from weeks to hours.
items.title_zh: Endava 如何利用 Codex 建立代理组织
items.summary_zh: 了解 Endava 如何使用 Codex 构建代理组织、加速软件交付并将需求分析从数周缩短至数小时。

items.title: Cisco and OpenAI redefine enterprise engineering with Codex
items.summary: Cisco and OpenAI are redefining enterprise engineering with Codex, helping Cisco scale AI-native development, accelerate AI Defense work, and automate defect remediation.
items.title_zh: 思科和 OpenAI 通过 Codex 重新定义企业工程
items.summary_zh: 思科和 OpenAI 正在通过 Codex 重新定义企业工程，帮助思科扩展 AI 原生开发、加速 AI 防御工作并自动执行缺陷修复。

items.title: Specialization Beats Scale: A Strategic Variable Most AI Procurement Decisions Overlook
items.title_zh: 专业化战胜规模：大多数人工智能采购决策忽视的战略变量

items.title: Technology usually creates jobs for young, skilled workers. Will AI do the same?
items.summary: A new study of the postwar U.S. shows which kinds of workers historically filled new tech-enabled jobs.
items.title_zh: 技术通常会为年轻的技术工人创造就业机会。人工智能也会这么做吗？
items.summary_zh: 一项针对战后美国的新研究显示了历史上哪些类型的工人担任了新技术支持的工作。

items.title: Games people — and machines — play: Untangling strategic reasoning to advance AI
items.summary: Assistant Professor Gabriele Farina mines the foundations of decision-making in complex multi-agent scenarios.
items.title_zh: 人和机器玩的游戏：理清战略推理以推进人工智能
items.summary_zh: 助理教授 Gabriele Farina 挖掘复杂多智能体场景中决策的基础。

items.title: Nio shares jump 10% after releasing first flagship EV in more than two years
items.summary: Chinese electric car company Nio has launched two lower-priced brands in the last two years to broaden its customer base in a sluggish Chinese consumer market.
items.title_zh: 两年多来发布首款旗舰电动汽车后，蔚来股价上涨 10%
items.summary_zh: 中国电动汽车公司蔚来在过去两年推出了两个低价品牌，以在低迷的中国消费市场中扩大客户群。

items.title: Moment Blue Origin rocket explodes during test in Florida
items.summary: A Blue Origin New Glenn rocket exploded on a launch pad at Cape Canaveral in Florida on Thursday night.
items.title_zh: 蓝色起源火箭在佛罗里达州测试期间爆炸的瞬间
items.summary_zh: 周四晚上，蓝色起源公司的一枚新格伦火箭在佛罗里达州卡纳维拉尔角的发射台上爆炸。

items.title: Trump’s Boat Strikes Have Failed to Curb Cocaine Flow to U.S., Experts Say
items.summary: Despite the rising body count off the South American coast, researchers say cocaine is as easy to get in many parts of the United States as it was before the strikes began.
items.title_zh: 专家称，特朗普的船只袭击未能遏制可卡因流入美国
items.summary_zh: 研究人员表示，尽管南美海岸附近的死亡人数不断上升，但可卡因在美国许多地区仍然像袭击开始前一样容易获得。

items.title: Gemini crypto exchange launches AI data feed powered by Grok
items.summary: The move comes as Gemini continues to expand beyond spot crypto trading into derivatives, predictions, and other financial services.
items.title_zh: Gemini 加密货币交易所推出由 Grok 提供支持的 AI 数据源
items.summary_zh: 此举正值 Gemini 继续从现货加密货币交易扩展到衍生品、预测和其他金融服务之际。

items.title: ITBench-AA: Frontier Models Score Below 50% on the First Benchmark for Agentic Enterprise IT Tasks — by Artificial Analysis and IBM
items.title_zh: ITBench-AA：在代理企业 IT 任务的第一个基准测试中，前沿模型的得分低于 50% — 由人工分析和 IBM 提供

items.title: OlmoEarth v1.1: A more efficient family of Earth observation models
items.title_zh: OlmoEarth v1.1：更高效的地球观测模型系列

items.title: 100 things we announced at I/O 2026
items.summary: We've been busy! Here’s a rundown of the top announcements, launches and demos at I/O 2026.
items.title_zh: 我们在 I/O 2026 上宣布的 100 件事
items.summary_zh: 我们一直很忙！以下是 I/O 2026 上最重要的公告、发布和演示的摘要。

items.title: How AI Mode is changing the way people search in the U.S.
items.summary: One year after launch, see how AI Mode’s users are shifting from keywords to natural language queries.
items.title_zh: AI 模式如何改变美国人们的搜索方式
items.summary_zh: 发布一年后，看看 AI 模式的用户如何从关键字转向自然语言查询。

items.title: New ways to create and get things done in Google Workspace
items.summary: Announcing new voice capabilities in Gmail, Docs and Keep, a new design tool called Google Pics and updates to AI Inbox.
items.title_zh: 在 Google Workspace 中创建和完成工作的新方法
items.summary_zh: 宣布 Gmail、Docs 和 Keep 中的新语音功能、名为 Google Pics 的新设计工具以及 AI Inbox 的更新。

items.title: Gemini 3.5: frontier intelligence with action
items.summary: At Google I/O we released Gemini 3.5, our latest series of models combining frontier intelligence with action.
items.title_zh: Gemini 3.5：前沿情报与行动
items.summary_zh: 在 Google I/O 大会上，我们发布了 Gemini 3.5，这是我们将前沿智能与行动相结合的最新模型系列。

items.title: Building AI models that understand chemical principles
items.summary: Connor Coley works at the interface of chemistry and machine learning, to discover and design new drug compounds.
items.title_zh: 构建理解化学原理的人工智能模型
items.summary_zh: Connor Coley 致力于化学和机器学习的结合，发现和设计新的药物化合物。

items.title: Beacon Biosignals is mapping the brain during sleep
items.summary: Founded by Jake Donoghue PhD ’19 and former MIT researcher Jarrett Revels, the company is creating an AI-driven platform to help diagnose and treat disease.
items.title_zh: Beacon Biosignals 正在绘制睡眠期间的大脑图
items.summary_zh: 该公司由 Jake Donoghue 博士 '19 和前麻省理工学院研究员 Jarrett Revels 创立，正在创建一个人工智能驱动的平台来帮助诊断和治疗疾病。

items.title: CFTC sues Rhode Island over actions against prediction markets
items.summary: It marks the seventh state the commission has sued in a dispute over who has the right to regulate event contract platforms.
items.title_zh: 美国商品期货交易委员会 (CFTC) 起诉罗德岛州针对预测市场的行为
items.summary_zh: 这是该委员会在谁有权监管赛事合约平台的争议中起诉的第七个州。

items.title: Gaming association says states have lost $1 billion in tax revenue due to prediction markets
items.summary: Bill Miller, American Gaming Association president and CEO, added that prediction market platforms in his view amount to "backdoor sports betting."
items.title_zh: 博彩协会称各州因预测市场损失了 10 亿美元的税收
items.summary_zh: 美国博彩协会主席兼首席执行官比尔·米勒补充说，他认为预测市场平台相当于“后门体育博彩”。

items.title: Google employee charged with $1M Polymarket insider trading bet on search term
items.summary: The complaint from the Southern District of New York comes just over a month after another insider trading case on Polymarket.
items.title_zh: 谷歌员工被控在 Polymarket 搜索词上进行 100 万美元内幕交易
items.summary_zh: 纽约南区的投诉是在 Polymarket 发生另一起内幕交易案件一个多月后发出的。

items.title: Traders are skeptical of Iran timeline for Strait of Hormuz reopening
items.summary: Despite reports Iran could return the passageway to normal traffic flows within a month of a peace deal, Kalshi traders thought that was unlikely.
items.title_zh: 交易商对伊朗重新开放霍尔木兹海峡的时间表持怀疑态度
items.summary_zh: 尽管有报道称伊朗可能会在和平协议签署后一个月内使该通道恢复正常交通，但卡尔什贸易商认为这不太可能。

items.title: Taiwan chip stocks climb after Nvidia announces $150 billion spending plans
items.summary: Mainland China-based chip giants such as Cambricon saw their shares tumble on Wednesday.
items.title_zh: 英伟达宣布 1500 亿美元支出计划后，台湾芯片股上涨
items.summary_zh: 寒武纪等中国大陆芯片巨头的股价周三暴跌。

items.title: China industrial profits jump 24.7% in April, fastest gain in over two years despite headwinds
items.summary: China’s industrial profits grew at their fastest pace in over two years in April, buoyed by stronger exports, higher producer prices and gains in upstream industries.
items.title_zh: 尽管面临阻力，中国 4 月份工业利润增长 24.7%，创两年多来最快增幅
items.summary_zh: 受出口强劲、生产者价格上涨和上游产业增长的推动，4月份中国工业利润增速创两年多来最快。

items.title: European companies double down on China manufacturing despite EU de-risking push
items.summary: Low manufacturing costs in China are keeping many European businesses' supply chains in the country despite pressure in the EU to reduce overseas reliance.
items.title_zh: 尽管欧盟推动降低风险，欧洲企业仍加倍投资中国制造业
items.summary_zh: 尽管欧盟面临减少海外依赖的压力，但中国较低的制造成本使许多欧洲企业的供应链留在了中国。

items.title: Survival before safety for Delhi's poor as temperatures hit 45C
items.summary: As temperatures peak, Delhi’s informal workers continue working despite growing health risks.
items.title_zh: 气温高达 45 摄氏度，德里穷人的生存先于安全
items.summary_zh: 随着气温达到顶峰，德里的非正规工人尽管健康风险不断增加，但仍继续工作。

items.title: Italy restores lucky testicles on bull mosaic worn down by tourists
items.summary: The artwork is the centre of a tradition that involves visitors performing three spins on it for good fortune.
items.title_zh: 意大利修复被游客磨损的公牛马赛克幸运睾丸
items.summary_zh: 这件艺术品是一项传统的中心，游客需要在它上面旋转三圈以获得好运。

items.title: Mother-in-law of Indian bride whose death set off media frenzy arrested
items.summary: Twisha Sharma's death on 12 May has sparked rival claims of murder and suicide and dominated headlines.
items.title_zh: 印度新娘之死引发媒体热议，其婆婆被捕
items.summary_zh: 特威莎·夏尔马 (Twisha Sharma) 于 5 月 12 日去世，引发了各种谋杀和自杀指控，并占据了头条新闻。

items.title: Gaza City hospitals say several killed in strike, as Israel targets Hamas leaders
items.summary: At least five children were reportedly killed in the strike, which appears to have targeted a Hamas commander.
items.title_zh: 加沙城医院称，以色列针对哈马斯领导人发动袭击，造成多人死亡
items.summary_zh: 据报道，至少五名儿童在这次袭击中丧生，袭击目标似乎是一名哈马斯指挥官。

items.title: Man jailed for 15 years over plot to attack Taylor Swift concert in Vienna
items.summary: A 21-year-old Austrian man is found guilty of planning the attack and other terrorism-related offences.
items.title_zh: 男子因密谋袭击泰勒·斯威夫特维也纳演唱会被判入狱 15 年
items.summary_zh: 一名 21 岁的奥地利男子被判犯有策划袭击和其他与恐怖主义有关的罪行。

items.title: Villas, cars and cash: Italy seizes dead Mafia mobster's millions
items.summary: Police say the operation targeted the network of notorious late Sicilian mafia boss Matteo Messina Denaro.
items.title_zh: 别墅、汽车和现金：意大利没收了死去的黑手党黑帮的数百万美元
items.summary_zh: 警方表示，这次行动的目标是臭名昭著的已故西西里黑手党老大马泰奥·梅西纳·德纳罗的网络。

items.title: Russian Drone Hits Romanian Apartment Building, Officials Say
items.summary: NATO condemned “Russia’s recklessness” and confirmed that it was in touch with the Romanian authorities.
items.title_zh: 官员称俄罗斯无人机击中罗马尼亚公寓楼
items.summary_zh: 北约谴责“俄罗斯的鲁莽行为”，并证实已与罗马尼亚当局保持联系。

items.title: France’s Far Right Has 2 Leaders. They Don’t Always Have One Voice.
items.summary: Marine Le Pen and her protégé, Jordan Bardella, lead presidential polls. They are united on curbing immigration but split recently on economic policy.
items.title_zh: 法国极右翼有两位领导人。他们并不总是有一种声音。
items.summary_zh: 玛丽娜·勒庞和她的门徒乔丹·巴尔德拉在总统选举中领先。他们在限制移民问题上意见一致，但最近在经济政策上出现分歧。

items.title: No, Not That Georgia. A.I. Compounds a Nation’s Identity Woes.
items.summary: Online queries are more likely to turn up references to the U.S. state — a problem for the republic in the Caucasus and its people. But a move to drop the name “Georgia” has lost steam.
items.title_zh: 不，不是那个乔治亚州。人工智能。加剧国家的身份认同困境。
items.summary_zh: 在线查询更有可能出现对美国政府的提及——这对高加索共和国及其人民来说是一个问题。但放弃“乔治亚”这个名字的举措已经失去了动力。

items.title: In Argentina, U.S. Tech Billionaire Peter Thiel Finds An Escape
items.summary: The billionaire’s new roots in Argentina are said to be partly motivated by concerns about the future of the United States and shared beliefs with Argentina’s right-wing leader.
items.title_zh: 美国科技亿万富翁彼得泰尔在阿根廷找到了出路
items.summary_zh: 据说，这位亿万富翁在阿根廷扎根的部分原因是对美国未来的担忧，以及与阿根廷右翼领导人的共同信念。

items.title: Guatemala Agrees to Joint Drug Gang Strikes With U.S., Expanding Trump’s Campaign
items.summary: The deal is part of a broader effort by the Trump administration to press Latin American countries to agree to joint operations inside their borders.
items.title_zh: 危地马拉同意与美国联合打击贩毒团伙，扩大特朗普的竞选范围
items.summary_zh: 该协议是特朗普政府施压拉丁美洲国家同意在其境内开展联合行动的更广泛努力的一部分。

items.title: Recent Quant Links from Quantocracy as of 05/17/2026
items.summary: This is a summary of links recently featured on Quantocracy as of Sunday, 05/17/2026. To see our most recent links, visit the Quant Mashup. Read on readers! Agentic Workflows for Alpha Research [Jonathan Kinlay] There is by now a small mountain of vendor material claiming that AI
items.title_zh: 截至 2026 年 5 月 17 日，来自 Quantocracy 的最新量化链接
items.summary_zh: 这是截至 2026 年 5 月 17 日星期日 Quantocracy 上最近推荐的链接的摘要。要查看我们最新的链接，请访问 Quant Mashup。请读者阅读！ Alpha Research 的代理工作流程 [Jonathan Kinlay] 目前有一小堆供应商材料声称 AI

items.title: Solana, Sui and Aptos wallet data targeted in TrapDoor package attack
items.summary: The campaign targets crypto, DeFi, AI and security developers with fake tooling packages to steal wallets, SSH keys, GitHub tokens, cloud credentials and browser data.
items.title_zh: TrapDoor 包攻击的目标是 Solana、Sui 和 Aptos 钱包数据
items.summary_zh: 该活动针对加密货币、DeFi、人工智能和安全开发人员，利用虚假工具包窃取钱包、SSH 密钥、GitHub 令牌、云凭证和浏览器数据。

items.title: OKX Ventures buys $53 million stake in Korea's Coinone exchange
items.summary: The crypto exchange's investment arm and Korea Investment & Securities will each invest 80 billion won ($53 million) as Coinone pushes into stablecoins and tokenized securities.
items.title_zh: OKX Ventures 价值 5300 万美元购买韩国 Coinone 交易所股份
items.summary_zh: 随着 Coinone 进军稳定币和代币化证券，该加密货币交易所的投资部门和韩国投资证券公司将各投资 800 亿韩元（5300 万美元）。

items.title: Tether's U.S.-focused stablecoin grows over 500% in a month, but still lags main rivals
items.summary: USAT's market cap jumped above $140 million in April, though it remains well behind Circle's USDC, PayPal's PYUSD and Ripple's RLUSD tokens.
items.title_zh: Tether 专注于美国的稳定币一个月内增长超过 500%，但仍落后于主要竞争对手
items.summary_zh: USAT 的市值在 4 月份跃升至 1.4 亿美元以上，但仍远远落后于 Circle 的 USDC、PayPal 的 PYUSD 和 Ripple 的 RLUSD 代币。

items.title: Ventuals to compensate traders after pre-IPO SpaceX perps plunge 45% on Hyperliquid
items.summary: Ventuals to compensate traders after faulty oracle data sent SPACEX perps down 45% on Hyperliquid, wiping $1.51 million.
items.title_zh: SpaceX 上市前因 Hyperliquid 股价暴跌 45%，风险投资公司对交易员进行补偿
items.summary_zh: 由于预言机数据错误导致 SPACEX 的 Hyperliquid 股票下跌 45%，损失 151 万美元，风险投资公司对交易员进行了补偿。

items.title: ‘First and only’: Paxos secures SEC registration as clearing and settlement agency
items.summary: Paxos said it is the first and only blockchain-native firm to be registered as a clearing agency under the SEC.
items.title_zh: “第一个也是唯一一个”：Paxos 作为清算和结算机构获得 SEC 注册
items.summary_zh: Paxos 表示，它是第一家也是唯一一家在 SEC 注册为清算机构的区块链本土公司。

items.title: NYSE parent ICE held multiple talks with Hyperliquid to evaluate onchain perps market, CEO says
items.summary: Sprecher's comment follows an earlier report that ICE and CME had held conversations on the Hill regarding Hyperliquid.
items.title_zh: 首席执行官表示，纽约证券交易所母公司 ICE 与 Hyperliquid 进行了多次会谈，以评估链上永续市场
items.summary_zh: 斯普雷彻发表此番言论之前，有报道称 ICE 和 CME 已在国会山就 Hyperliquid 进行了对话。

items.title: OKX confirms $53 million investment to acquire 20% stake in Coinone crypto exchange
items.summary: This marks the latest move by a global crypto giant to secure a foothold in South Korea, following Binance's acquisition of Gopax.
items.title_zh: OKX确认投资5300万美元收购Coinone加密货币交易所20%的股份
items.summary_zh: 这标志着继币安收购 Gopax 后，全球加密巨头为在韩国站稳脚跟而采取的最新举措。

items.title: The Digital Chamber ramps up pressure on Congress with call to action to pass Clarity Act
items.summary: The Digital Chamber published a website to serve as a central spot for people to write to lawmakers in its latest push to pass a crypto bill.
items.title_zh: 数字商会加大对国会的压力，呼吁采取行动通过《清晰度法案》
items.summary_zh: 数字商会发布了一个网站，作为人们向立法者写信的中心地点，以推动通过加密货币法案的最新努力。

items.title: Kalshi’s turn: Prediction markets platform sues Minnesota over law going into effect in August
items.summary: Following the CFTC's suit, Kalshi has sued the state of Minnesota after Governor Tim Walz signed a law blocking prediction markets.
items.title_zh: 卡尔希轮到了：预测市场平台就明尼苏达州八月份生效的法律提起诉讼
items.summary_zh: 在 CFTC 提起诉讼后，在州长 Tim Walz 签署了一项禁止预测市场的法律后，Kalshi 起诉了明尼苏达州。

items.title: Tether’s USAT supply grows 540% month-over-month, latest attestation shows
items.summary: Tether’s USA₮ supply grew six-fold month-over-month to over 140 million tokens, according to Anchorage Digital's latest attestation.
items.title_zh: 最新证明显示，Tether 的 USAT 供应量环比增长 540%
items.summary_zh: 根据 Anchorage Digital 的最新证明，Tether USA₮ 的供应量环比增长六倍，达到超过 1.4 亿枚代币。

items.title: MUFG aims to become AI-native with OpenAI
items.summary: MUFG uses ChatGPT Enterprise to build an AI-native organization, improve workflows, and deliver new AI-powered financial services at scale.
items.title_zh: MUFG 旨在通过 OpenAI 成为人工智能原生
items.summary_zh: MUFG 使用 ChatGPT Enterprise 构建人工智能原生组织、改进工作流程并大规模提供新的人工智能驱动的金融服务。

items.title: OpenAI’s Frontier Governance Framework
items.summary: Explore OpenAI’s Frontier Governance Framework and how our AI safety, security, and risk practices align with emerging EU and California regulations.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 的前沿治理框架
items.summary_zh: 探索 OpenAI 的前沿治理框架，以及我们的 AI 安全、保障和风险实践如何与新兴的欧盟和加州法规保持一致。

items.title: Building self-improving tax agents with Codex
items.summary: See how OpenAI, Thrive, and Crete built a self-improving tax agent with Codex, automating filings, improving accuracy, and accelerating workflows.
items.title_zh: 利用 Codex 打造自我完善的税务代理人

items.title: Election information and safeguards in 2026
items.summary: Ahead of global elections, we’re helping people access information, supporting cyber defenders, and increasing AI transparency
items.title_zh: 2026 年选举信息和保障措施
items.summary_zh: 在全球选举之前，我们正在帮助人们获取信息、支持网络防御者并提高人工智能透明度

items.title: OpenAI named a Leader in enterprise coding agents by Gartner
items.summary: OpenAI is named a leader in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Enterprise AI Coding Agents, with Codex recognized for innovation and enterprise-scale deployment.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 被 Gartner 评为企业编码代理领域的领导者
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 在 2026 年 Gartner 企业 AI 编码代理魔力象限中被评为领导者，Codex 因创新和企业规模部署而获得认可。

items.title: How Virgin Atlantic ships faster with Codex
items.summary: How Virgin Atlantic used Codex to ship its revamped mobile app on a fixed holiday travel deadline, reaching near-total unit test coverage and zero P1 defects.
items.title_zh: 维珍航空如何利用 Codex 加快运输速度
items.summary_zh: 维珍航空如何使用 Codex 在固定的假日旅行截止日期内发布其改进的移动应用程序，实现接近全部单元测试覆盖率和零 P1 缺陷。

items.title_zh: Reachy Mini 完全本地化

items.title: Catch up on 12 major I/O 2026 moments
items.summary: Here are 12 of the biggest Google I/O 2026 keynote moments, including news about Gemini Omni, Gemini 3.5 Flash and more.

items.summary_zh: 以下是 12 个最重要的 Google I/O 2026 主题演讲时刻，包括有关 Gemini Omni、Gemini 3.5 Flash 等的新闻。

items.title: Catch up on the Dialogues stage at Google I/O 2026.
items.summary: A recap of the 2026 I/O Dialogues, where leaders discuss the future of AI, quantum computing, robotics and creativity.

items.summary_zh: 回顾 2026 年 I/O 对话，领导人讨论人工智能、量子计算、机器人和创造力的未来。

items.title: We’re announcing new community investments in Missouri.
items.summary: We’re helping build the state’s next-generation workforce and investing in energy programs.
items.title_zh: 我们宣布在密苏里州进行新的社区投资。
items.summary_zh: 我们正在帮助培养该州的下一代劳动力并投资能源项目。

items.title: A new experiment brings better group meetings to Google Beam
items.summary: See and hear your colleagues in true-to-life size and sound, making hybrid meetings feel more inclusive and connected.
items.title_zh: 一项新实验为 Google Beam 带来了更好的小组会议
items.summary_zh: 以逼真的尺寸和声音看到和听到同事的​​声音，使混合会议感觉更具包容性和联系。

items.title: I/O 2026

items.summary_zh: 在 Google I/O 2026 上，我们分享了如何让人工智能为每个人提供更多帮助。查看我们宣布的所有内容。

items.summary_zh: Google I/O 最新动态：了解我们如何帮助您利用 Gemini 完成更多工作。

items.title: Media Advisory: MIT to establish regional quantum hub
items.summary: With $25 million investment from the Commonwealth of Massachusetts, MIT to build a new shared-use facility to serve as a statewide quantum toolbox.
items.title_zh: 媒体咨询：麻省理工学院将建立区域量子中心
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院获得马萨诸塞州联邦投资 2500 万美元，用于建造一个新的共享设施，作为全州范围内的量子工具箱。

items.title: Justin Solomon appointed associate dean of engineering education
items.summary: MIT faculty member in electrical engineering and computer science to focus on innovation in engineering education and new pedagogical approaches.
items.title_zh: 贾斯汀·所罗门被任命为工程教育副院长
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院电气工程和计算机科学教员，专注于工程教育和新教学方法的创新。

items.title: Two from MIT named 2026 Knight-Hennessy Scholars
items.summary: The prestigious fellowship funds graduate studies at Stanford University.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的两名学生被评为 2026 年 Knight-Hennessy 学者
items.summary_zh: 这项享有盛誉的奖学金资助斯坦福大学的研究生学习。

items.title: Q&A: Expanding MIT’s global reach through Universal Learning
items.summary: Dimitris Bertsimas and Megan Mitchell discuss the motivation behind Universal Learning, and what sets the new MIT Open Learning educational initiative apart.
items.title_zh: 问答：通过通用学习扩大麻省理工学院的全球影响力
items.summary_zh: Dimitris Bertsimas 和 Megan Mitchell 讨论了通用学习背后的动机，以及麻省理工学院新的开放学习教育计划的与众不同之处。

items.title: Universal AI is “a pathway to AI fluency that’s accessible and approachable to anyone, anywhere”
items.summary: New AI education program from MIT Open Learning debuts with AI-powered personalization and a free introductory course for learners everywhere.
items.title_zh: 通用人工智能是“一条通向人工智能流畅之路，任何人、任何地方都可以使用、平易近人”
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院开放学习的新人工智能教育项目首次推出，为世界各地的学习者提供人工智能驱动的个性化和免费入门课程。

items.title: Study: Firms often use automation to control certain workers’ wages
items.summary: MIT economists found US companies tend to target employees earning a “wage premium,” which increases inequality but not necessarily productivity.
items.title_zh: 研究：公司经常使用自动化来控制某些工人的工资
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的经济学家发现，美国公司倾向于以赚取“工资溢价”的员工为目标，这会增加不平等，但不一定会提高生产率。
